decks.notes: The deck focuses on utilizing a mix of control spells and creature abilities to manage board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It aims to maintain card advantage while dealing damage over time, using spells like Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson to control the game tempo. Monument to Endurance helps to generate value and resilience, while Gran-Gran and other creatures provide additional threats. The mana base is optimized to ensure smooth gameplay and allows for flexible casting of spells. The deck combines Izzet colors to create a versatile and dynamic control strategy.

The main concept of this Rakdos Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Bloodghast, Flamewake Phoenix, and Marauding Mako, the deck aims to deal quick damage and pressure the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Monument to Endurance and Inti, Seneschal of the Sun to maintain board presence and continue the aggressive strategy. Additionally, cards like Requiting Hex and Blazemire Verge provide removal and disruption to further push the opponent on the back foot.

This deck focuses on fast and aggressive gameplay with the use of low-cost creatures and mana ramp cards in order to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The strategy is to build a wide board presence and use powerful enchantments like Earthbender Ascension to boost the team's power and abilities. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provide additional mana fixing and card advantage, allowing the player to maintain pressure on the opponent. The inclusion of Ba Sing Se and Cryptic Caves provides extra utility and card draw options to keep the aggression going.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to play powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo early in the game. It also utilizes cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Esper Origins to buff up your creatures and overwhelm your opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. The inclusion of cards like Escape Tunnel and Promising Vein allows for additional flexibility and surprise plays, while the overall theme of the deck is centered around utilizing the strength of green creatures to quickly take control of the board.

This Azorius Aggro deck focuses on a fast-paced, aggressive strategy utilizing creatures like Aang, Swift Savior and Aven Interrupter to push for early damage. The deck also includes disruption spells like Spell Snare and Get Lost to control the opponent's game plan. Enduring Curiosity and No More Lies provide card advantage, while Avatar's Wrath and High Noon deliver powerful finishers. The inclusion of planeswalkers like Ajani, Outland Chaperone and Elspeth, Storm Slayer adds versatility to the deck, which is supported by a balanced mana base including Floodfarm Verge and Hallowed Fountain.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells. By quickly establishing a board presence with cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Roaming Throne, the deck aims to consistently apply pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Cards like Sunderflock and Wistfulness provide additional support by controlling the board and setting up for the final attack. With a mix of creature-based aggro and spell-based tactics, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield for a devastating surprise attack. By utilizing cards like Deceit and Superior Spider-Man, along with spells such as Doomsday Excruciator and Bitter Triumph, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big creatures and powerful abilities. The combination of reanimation spells like Requiting Hex and graveyard fillers like Stock Up creates a synergistic playstyle that can catch opponents off guard and secure victories.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with quick and efficient creatures and spells, focusing on evasion and damage output. By utilizing cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, along with burst damage spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics, the deck aims to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total and control the board. The inclusion of cards like Drake Hatcher and Stormchaser's Talent provides additional threats and card advantage to maintain pressure on the opponent. The mana base is designed to ensure consistent access to all colors of mana for efficient spell casting.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive creature strategy, utilizing powerful dragons and other creatures to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The deck also includes removal spells and combat tricks to control the board and protect your creatures. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistent and efficient casting of your powerful creatures and spells, maximizing your chances of victory through aggressive and proactive play.

The deck focuses on using a combination of control elements like counterspells, removal, and card advantage to slow down the opponent's strategy and ultimately take over the game. With a mix of powerful creatures and disruptive spells, it aims to outlast the opponent's threats while building up its own advantage. The mana base is carefully constructed to provide the necessary colors while also incorporating utility lands for additional benefits. Overall, the deck aims to control the game's pace and dictate the outcome through powerful late-game threats and resource management.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating value through various spells and abilities. By utilizing a mix of card draw, burn spells, and versatile enchantments, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent. It also includes a land package that ensures consistency and flexibility in casting spells of diverse mana costs. Overall, the deck seeks to dominate the battlefield and dictate the pace of the game.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain control of the game through strategic spells and abilities. By utilizing cards like Gran-Gran, Monument to Endurance, and Abandon Attachments, the deck aims to outlast opponents and protect key cards. Accumulate Wisdom and Combustion Technique provide card advantage and removal options, while Firebending Lesson and Boomerang Basics offer versatility in dealing with threats. The goal is to establish board presence and control the pace of the game, ultimately leading to victory through a combination of control and strategic play.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension in order to bring out powerful creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Sazh's Chocobo. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Fecund Greenshell help to buff up the creatures and increase their strength. The deck also includes ways to protect and support the creatures with cards like Archdruid's Charm and Sapling Nursery. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive mono green creature strategy.

The deck focuses on fast-paced aggression with a mono green theme, utilizing creatures with low mana costs and efficient abilities to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also includes strategies to ramp up mana production and improve creature strength, supporting the aggressive playstyle. Additionally, the inclusion of land and mana ramp cards ensures consistent access to resources. The deck aims to establish board presence early and apply pressure to control the game tempo, ultimately dominating the opponent before they can establish their own strategy.

This deck focuses on fast-paced aggressive plays, utilizing creatures with abilities that allow them to keep coming back to the battlefield, putting constant pressure on the opponent. It also includes powerful combat tricks and removal spells to maintain board control and deal additional damage. The mana base is designed to support the aggressive strategy, ensuring consistent access to the different colors needed for the deck. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent quickly, leading to a swift victory before they can stabilize.

The focus of this deck is to maintain control of the game through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage. By using cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Consult the Star Charts to draw additional cards, as well as cards like Burst Lightning and Stock Up to remove threats from the opponent, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan and eventually win the game through powerful late-game plays. The deck also includes cards like Icetill Explorer and Earthbender Ascension to provide additional utility and versatility in different game situations.
